nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 东洋界
nodes.summary: The Indomalayan realm is one of the eight biogeographic realms.

nodes.name: 小雲雀
nodes.summary: 小雲雀（Oriental skylark，学名 Alauda gulgula），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、沼泽。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Like other skylarks, it is found in open grassland where it feeds on seeds and insects

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It occurs from sea level up to 4,300 m altitude, and is usually found in open areas with short vegetation, such as grasslands, marshes, the edges of lakes, etc
